metadata.description: Outcome-first plus directional language. A two-layer skill for writing prompts, agent directives, and skill descriptions that point the model at the destination on every token.

plugins.name: directional-prompting
plugins.description: Write prompts, system instructions, agent directives, and skill descriptions using two stacked layers: outcome-first (goal, success criteria, stopping condition) plus directional language (every sentence names the path with positive verbs).
